seoTitle: How to Get a 20% Off TurboTax Coupon Code (2026)
metaDescription: Want to save on tax prep? Here's how to find and apply a 20% off TurboTax promo code before you file this season.
intro: Tax season can get expensive fast, especially if you're paying full price for filing software. This guide covers how to find a 20% off TurboTax coupon code and apply it correctly during checkout, so you can keep more of your money whether you're filing solo or managing returns for clients.

steps.heading: Find the latest TurboTax coupon codes
steps.body: Look for current 20% off TurboTax promo codes before you start your filing, since availability and codes can change with the season.

steps.heading: Apply the promo code during checkout
steps.body: Enter the coupon code at the appropriate step in the TurboTax platform to apply the discount to your filing costs.

steps.heading: Avoid common mistakes when using promo codes
steps.body: Watch out for expired codes or entry errors that can prevent the discount from being applied correctly.

steps.heading: Maximize your overall savings
steps.body: Combine smart promo code use with other savings strategies to reduce your total tax preparation costs.

steps.heading: Apply this whether you're filing individually or for a business
steps.body: The discount approach works whether you're an individual filing for the first time or a professional managing a larger client portfolio.

faq.question: Where can I find a 20% off TurboTax coupon code?
faq.answer: The video walks through finding the latest available TurboTax coupon codes so you can apply the discount before filing.

faq.question: How do I apply a TurboTax promo code?
faq.answer: You enter the code during the checkout or payment step of the TurboTax filing process, following the steps demonstrated in the tutorial.

faq.question: What mistakes should I avoid when using a TurboTax promo code?
faq.answer: Common mistakes include using expired codes or mistyping them, both of which can stop the discount from applying.

faq.question: Can businesses use TurboTax promo codes too?
faq.answer: Yes, the tutorial covers examples from both individual and business perspectives on making the most of available discounts.
